summary: Phase A Athlete Dashboard & Programs CRUD - ALL 21 TESTS PASSED. Backend: 21/21 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All 6 Playwright tests passed (Login, Greeting, Pulse Stats, Actions, Spotlight, Activity/Events, Director Regression).
critical_code_review_comments: athlete_dashboard.py: Well-structured tenant_id scoping via get_athlete_tenant() helper
athlete_dashboard.py: Proper 403 enforcement for non-athlete/parent roles
athlete_dashboard.py: Batch signals computation (_batch_signals) for efficient DB queries
athlete_dashboard.py: Board grouping logic correctly implements 5-stage funnel (archived, overdue, in_conversation, waiting_on_reply, needs_outreach)
athlete_dashboard.py: Cascade delete on program removes related coaches and interactions
athlete_dashboard.py: Auto-follow-up dates set correctly per interaction type (email_sent=14d, camp=3d, etc.)
AthleteDashboard.js: All required data-testid attributes present and working
AthleteDashboard.js: Dashboard sections render correctly (greeting, pulse, actions, spotlight, activity, events)
AthleteDashboard.js: Responsive grid layout for stat cards (2-col mobile, 4-col desktop)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing seeded data for Emma Chen (5 programs, 4 interactions, 3 events)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A fully verified. Key endpoints tested: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/athlete/programs, GET/POST /api/athlete/college-coaches, GET/POST /api/athlete/interactions, POST /api/athlete/programs/{id}/mark-replied, GET /api/athlete/follow-ups, GET/POST /api/athlete/events, GET /api/athlete/dashboard. Emma Chen (athlete_3) has tenant_id=tenant-9ec4167f-0874-4502-803f-6647b8f4cc26 with 5 seeded programs. Board groups verified: Stanford=overdue (past due date), Tampa+Emory=needs_outreach (no interactions), UCLA=waiting_on_reply (outreach sent, no coach reply), UF=in_conversation (has coach_reply). Director gets 403 on all /api/athlete/* endpoints. Frontend dashboard shows all 5 sections with correct data-testid attributes.

test_1_list_programs_5_programs.details: GET /api/athlete/programs returns 5+ programs with signals and board_group

test_4_update_program_priority.details: PUT /api/athlete/programs/{id} updates priority to Very High

test_5_delete_program_cascade.details: DELETE /api/athlete/programs/{id} cascades to coaches and interactions

test_8_list_interactions_ordered.details: GET /api/athlete/interactions returns list ordered by date_time desc

test_9_create_interaction_follow_up.details: POST /api/athlete/interactions creates interaction and sets auto-follow-up

test_11_list_follow_ups.details: GET /api/athlete/follow-ups returns programs with overdue follow-ups

test_12_dashboard_all_sections.details: GET /api/athlete/dashboard returns profile, stats, follow_ups_due, needs_first_outreach, spotlight, recent_activity, upcoming_events

test_17_frontend_pulse.details: Dashboard pulse shows 4 stat cards (Schools=5, Response Rate=67%, Awaiting Reply=1, Follow-ups Due=1)

test_18_frontend_actions.details: Today's Actions shows 1 follow-up (Stanford) and 2 outreach (Tampa, Emory)

test_20_frontend_activity_events.details: Activity Feed shows 6 interactions, Events shows 3 upcoming events
